package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_per_request_topk_full_sort: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag request paths that sort all candidates when heap-based top-k selection would bound work.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario499Negative(values []string) string {
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	best := values[0]
	for _, value := range values[1:] {
		if value < best { best = value }
	}
	return best
}
